I read the Google reviews before coming and had low expectations, so let this be the one that persuades you to stay! You can also hear the ocean from the campsite which was a nice surprise.
Nice accommodation, near to the beach, short drive to town. WiFi weak.
Die Glamping Zelte sind ja ganz ok, aber der Zustand der WC/Bäder sind eine Katastrophe. Überall Schimmel, richtig hässlich!

Unfortunately the wifi did not work at all. Even after complaining several times, the staff was not able to get me connected.
Poor experience for the money paid.
I love the place ! Everyone is super kind, the kitchen have lots of facilities and the toilets where always clean!

Camped here whilst staying at Byron Bay. Daggy old bathroom facilities, clearly need a damn good clean!
Too far from Byron to walk easily to town and permanent residents near our site making park even less appealing especially the 3:30am shift working neighbour!
Had an overall ok feel re the park itself but bathrooms huge disappointment, no shower curtains/soap dish/shower caddy, shower head in one cubicle kept falling off🤦🏻‍♀️ just all needed updating & better cleaning staff!
Definitely be better options in Byron than this park! Sorry to say but I’d avoid this one until it’s upgraded, maybe check out bathrooms before committing!

Lovely park. Laundry that uses apple pay which was great! Bathrooms were unisex with basin, shower and toilet in one. Pet friendly, lots of camp kitchens, pool, skate park, play park and a basketball mini court.

Very polite staff and very helpful especially the  new maintenance guy and the head cleaning lady who had the amenities spotless every morning pity there’s so many filthy grubs that can’t manage to fish a toilet or wash out the sink after having a shave

Easy booking and check in. Good caravan spot at the back of the park with only 2 neighbours. The site was mostly sand and some grass which was nice but the “hard” annex bit was a hard plastic section which was extremely sore on the feet. Put our annex floor over the top which made some difference. The walk to the beach is nice just be aware that it goes past an old open sewer treatment “pond” there are signs to not swim and it doesn’t smell but it does look like you could swim if you weren’t careful to read the signs. The beach was a dog friendly area and the sand flat went out a good distance with knee high water.
The park roads could do with a tidy up as it pooled large amounts of water on and next to as the edges were a bit eroded. My main disappointment was the laundry. Of course the park can’t help if it rains-it just would have been helpful if there was an updated laundry with a few more dryers. We did have a good time here and would return for another stay

Don't book a premium site, they are far worse than the standard sites of most parks. While some areas of the park have some new facilities (like the glamping tent area), the rest of the park is run down making it over priced.
Advertising this park as "Premium" take the term "Flogging a Dead Horse" to a new level. Extremely disappointed.
Also, expect to be spammed with unsolicited text message marketing material during your stay.
If I stay there again, it will only be because they are pet friendly, even though half the people with dogs seems to walk around with them off leash.
I honestly think I'd be better off free camping somewhere.
Good place to stay at Byron Bay, the cabin room was good, and there are activities for the kids to do.
Had a great stay super pet friendly and nice walk to the beach
We were in our caravan, the site was amazing but you are out of town. The beach here was amazing!!! Xx🩷🩷
Very friendly. We felt like home!
We had a great stay here and even spotted a Koala!!!

Miscommunication, that's the correct world for my weekend. The staff was not clear when they give us our site, and the site also had a terrible sign. Super hard to find the correct one. Because of that faulty marks, we get lost and make camp on the incorrect one, three days took for the staff realize about that and after all of that time, they ask us for pay more money, different rate between sites. Badly, personally don't recommend this place.
Communication was terrible. Spots numbers aren't clear enough. Had to paid extra cost for their fault. Awful experience.

Shameful, we had food stolen from the communal fridge 5 times in 3 weeks, they told us to put it in a communal fridge with camera which we did but after 2 more thefts WHICH WERE FILMED, they tell us they can't do anything, only to change their story and tell us they don't have much time, then that they'll do it and call us, only to end up doing nothing at all. We lost a total of $300 worth of food. You have to wonder if the campsite isn't covering up for one of the staff, so deliberate is their inaction.

I'm not too bad. Caravan Park could do with some updating. Maybe some concrete slabs for Caravans. We did a camp this time and there's no lights down the end of the road and also a few Taps would be good cuz we had our dogs with us and I had to walk all the way back to the amenities. The combined shower  were good except when you have a shower. It's full of dirt because people have been in and out going to the toilet but other than that a  pretty good caravan Park

A really nice ten minute walk to the beach through the wetlands, lots of amenities and good standard for a large park. Our powered site had no water tap so had to steal water from the neighbours caravan. No biggie. Two mornings In a row in the toilet sitting next to a bloke smoking while on the crapper. Maybe installation of smoke alarms would be beneficial. The speed of some drivers through the park is alarming as there are lots of small Kids playing on the roads and there are no speed bumps. Nice we were at the back of the park less busy and nice scenery, but pretty sandy and gritty, The girl working in reception probably in her mid thirties has some customer service skills to work on. Not overly nice. Overall good location and can hear the waves crashing from the beach.

Loved our stay here! We'd booked a cabin for 2. Clean and well-kept rooms, cafe on site, safe and quiet, bus stop right outside and not too far from the main town. We has a great experience. The staff was quite welcoming as well. Thanks Ingenia! Recommended.

Where do I begin? Booked a Superior Studio Cabin and was allocated #74, it was anything but superior. You walk in and the cabin stunk, almost like it hadn't been cleaned, the couch smelled of tobacco smoke and the split system left an awful odour when you had it on.

On the bench with the tea & coffee were three packaged biscuits, one of them was open and therefore full of ants, which were then right along the bench and up the wall. There were ants on the bed as well as hairs on the pillows, sheets and shower curtain. All of this before either myself or my partner had even sat down on anything.

The following day my partner asked the team at reception for the code to exit the boom gate as I had needed to leave earlier to go somewhere and used our code, because I hadn't returned, she wasn't able to use the same code to which she was met with an extremely rude response from reception, telling her that we shouldn't be using our code when exiting with other people in their car. There is no logical reason a code can only be used once especially when couples or families are staying there and not doing everything together. There is also no reason for staff to be so rude, a simple explanation would quite easily suffice.

We had multiple friends staying at the caravan park, many of which required their rooms changed for different reasons, one families cabin smelt of cat urine, another had no running hot water and a third whose cabin smelt of tobacco smoke.
The entire caravan park smelt of someone cooking off pumpkin soup all day and all night - not sure what smelt worse - the cabin or the caravan park.

We were booked for three nights, we stayed for two and would never go back or recommend this caravan park to anyone.
Our suggestion is to pay a little extra and stay somewhere nice.

We were super impressed by how friendly the team are here! From the maintenance guys to cleaners and reception, everyone we met was friendly, chatty and helpful. They even let us store our camper trailer there and spread out all our wet stuff in the sun across multiple sites to dry it out after everything got soaked. The cabin was also very nice and had everything we needed. Thanks so much for having us!
The camp was a bit untidy and the bathrooms are not the best
Great stay at powered ensuite site. There was a mixup on sites late at night and situation was handled perfectly by park staff. :)

In general, very disappointing. Definatelly not good value for money.
- Unpolite staff that don’t look for the client’s comfort.
- Advertising shows transparent ceiling tents, that’s not the reality.
- The cleaning could be better. Cutlery, glasses and plates, bathroom… cleaning standards very low.
- Common areas don’t have proper electricity power. We couldn’t even boil the kettle to make coffee.

Stayed at Ingenia Byron for 3 nights $126, nice cafe & bar, massage, pool, clean bathroom. However, too close to neighbor when it busy

在 Ingenia Byron 住了3晚$126，有不錯的咖啡館和酒吧、按摩、游泳池、乾淨的浴室。 然而，繁忙時離鄰居太近

Ingenia Byron に 3泊$126で泊まりました。素敵なカフェとバー、マッサージ、プール、清潔なバスルームがあります。ただし、混雑しているときは隣の近所に近すぎます

We stayed for 4 nights
Good location, amenities were ok, ling weekend Saturday in the arvo there were no toilet paper in the toilets and they're disgusting.
Powered sites smaller than unpowered. The particular one that we stayed (104) was terrible, some permanent residents with tents (very untidy), behind a toilet block, could even parked my ute next to us due to lack of space.
Staff friendly but not very understanding of how to place friends next to each other (even though we asked) and accommodate people as per setup size.

We ended up leaving on the 3rd day.
Would I stay there again? Probably, but I would make sure I could choose my site number/location.

We had a very pleasant stay for two nights. The beautiful and empty beach is an idyllic 10-minute walk away.  Byron Bay is also just a few minutes away. The pool and grounds are beautifully laid out. The amenities are a little dated, but still perfectly acceptable. Many thanks for a great stay.

Caravan  parking sites are not good for big vans on powered sites.
Crammed in like sardines.
Facilities are not good for young children playground is more for 10 years and up .
Very unsafe for young children.
Nothing like there park in Nambucca heads I would give them 10out of 10 .
Pot holes everywhere.
Very peaceful and quiet

Great location with short walk to large quiet beach, good pizza's from cafe at front, allocated parking outside accommodation , short drive to byron bay. Only issue the bedroom had no door...and bathroom accessed via bedroom... our adult daughter was on sofa bed in main room, bit awkward as no privacy for all!

Camping has to flee. We made a booking for 4 days. From the first day we were awakened at 8am by one of the guards who shook our tent to go see the park manager who wanted our coordinates. Why not ask them at the booking ? Especially when it was made in the rules.  We announced the right number of tents and people... The park manager just said that we couldn’t stay here for no reasons. She has a way of talking that was very unrespectfull and treated us like nothing. We were robbed until we left while we were just sleeping in the camping and nothing else.
The kitchen is in terrible shape, not to mention the showers but it a detail after been treated like this by humans!

One of the better caravan parks in Byron bay … but the ablution block is simply aweful. It’s badly designed so the shower space is always filthy and wet and covered in hair. Best using the older shower block. Also … the concept of having touch a code in your accessing everything is beyond me. We come camping to get away from it all. Outside of these couple complaints, it’s a great place

Great value for money!
Wouldn't stay anywhere else in Byron

We booked this campsite very last minute, as we weren't sure whether we wanted to stay longer in the area. I was surprised by the quite good price, especially considering the great location of this campsite. The bathrooms were very clean and the kitchen had everything we needed. I recommend this campsite! You can also eat an evening pizza or morning breakfast there, and have a cup of coffee before continuing your journey.
Stayed a couple of days and had a great experience, would recommend.

We used an unpowered site for our 7m long campervan for 3 nights here. Reception staff were helpful and friendly. Bathroom and shower facilities were clean, in a central location and we never had to wait to use them. Laundry machines were a little busy but reasonably priced. Camp kitchens were also well maintained. We felt safe and looked after as staff and cleaners patrolled the grounds several times a day. Location was far enough from town to be peaceful but close enough to access by bicycle but not walking. Tallow beach is accessible from the campsite as well as a swimming pool and kids activities. The site was fantastic value and I would definitely stay again when visiting Byron bay.

The park is great! We stayed for 3 nights on an unpowered site in our campervan, the sites themselves are a good size and staff attempt to space out guests when not too busy so it doesn’t feel like your all boxed in. The spots well maintained. The park itself is great! Plenty of bathrooms/showers within very close walking distance, I found them appropriately cleaned for the size of the park/amount of people there, water is hot. Plenty of extras at the park for kids, a pool, jumping pad and TV room as well as multiple outdoor yet undercover kitchen areas that have a mix of fridges, cook tops, kettles and toasters. There’s a beach about an 8min walk from the property that was nice (albeit close to a sewage cleaning plantation) and a great location about a 7min drive into the centre of Byron. Overall a very affordable park for what’s offered! Would return.

We camped here for a night in Byron the location was perfect, our camp site was basic but all we required. Beach access and walk to beach was lovely. The amenities were nice but the bathrooms need A LOT of attention bins were full, water all over floors, soap stuck in windows.

We cant thank Cathy enough for her generosity. I made an error with a booking date for my adult kids that were coming to spend a few days with us at the park.
When I went to Cathy with my error, Cathy organised their best cabin at no additional cost to us, above and beyond,! we were blown away, especially since she had to do nothing as it was my error.
The park is beautiful and quiet , surrounded by trees , and only a few minutes walk to the beach.
Thank you so much Cathy for your kindness.

Best value for money in Byron.
I stayed in my van and had a great 2 night stay.
45min walk/10min bike into town or a very cheap uber.
The bike track to the beach also flows round to Suffolk Park Bakery.

Best park we have been too. Even though it rained continually, the park had a really good feel about it. The owner was really friendly and always stopped to say hello. Great coffee and breakfast at the front Cafe, clean amenities. Highly recommend 👌

Residence con bungalow con numerosi servizi accessori disponibili self service ed a pagamento. L'accesso dell'auto è controllato sia in ingresso che in uscita ed il parcheggio interno è riservato accanto al bungalow. Il camping offre servizi di lavanderia ed asciugatura con lavatrici ed asciugatrici molto grandi ma che ahimè non son sempre pulitissime. Le stanze son grandi anche se il mobilio è un po' spartano: in un bungalow per 4 persone c'era solo un armadio in una stanza e nessuno nell'altra. Attenzione che serve l'auto o la bicicletta per raggiungere Byron Bay
Loved it. Clean, modern cabins. We're coming back!!
Low level caravan park

Nice enough place, could have been more central but had everything we needed and we could uber to the centre. Pet friendly too.
Only issue was our room smelled a bit when we arrived.
This is a 5star for the awesome reception team, Natalia and the lovely Scottish Las. Great customer service, and very helpful as our plans changed. Good on yas, and highly recommended.

Stayed in an eco-cabin. Looked close to new. Quality appointments with 3 TV's! Rooms small though, aside from the giant bathroom. Could not use the induction cooktop as there was no booklet, no brand to google, and it was after hours by the time we tried to use. It was either faulty or we were just dumb - we'll never know now.

We camp in this site for 3 nights, it was a great place! The amenities are great, everything clean and tidy at all times. The beach is right next to it, only 10 minutes away through a path. I recommend staying here :)

Lovely camp site. All the staff is really attentive and the cabins are spotless. Swimming pool is well maintained and the common areas are clean and well organised. I would totally recommend this place. Thanks for everything.

Service:
Trotz sehr vieler Sonderwünsche und extra Fragen waren alle Mitarbeiter super freundlich und hilfsbereit.
5/5*

Zimmer:
Ausgesprochen schöne und gut ausgestattete Zimmer!
Waschmaschine und Trockner, Smart TV mit dem man auch Netflix, YouTube und Amazon schauen kann.
5/5*

Anlage:
Wirklich sehr schön.!!!
Gerade auch mit Kindern ein toller Campingplatz.
5/5*

Wildlife:
Es gibt super viele Flughunde, die man toll beobachten kann. Zudem wachsen dort Passionsfrüchte und Bananen
5/5*

Fazit:
Auch für längere Aufenthalte ist es wirklich toll hier.
5/5*

Sehr nette Mitarbeiter an der Rezeption, super hilfsbereit.
Freundliches Personal auf dem Platz.
Auf diesem Platz wird sehr auf Sauberkeit geachtet. Ebenso schöne Stellplätze.
Der Strand ist 6 Minuten zu Fuß weg. Hier gibt es einen schönen Fußweg durch einen Naturpark.
Danke Leute, die zwei Nächte haben sich definitiv wie Urlaub angefühlt!

Had an Absolutely amazing week.
Cabins are super clean, the park is exceptionally clean and all staff are always on the go but still find the time to happily greet you as walking past.
Everyone is very friendly and I couldn't recommend a better place to stay.
We will definitely be back.

Arrived at the Ingenia Holiday Park Byron Bay for our 5 night stay. Staff were super friendly, super helpful and very welcoming. The unpowered camp sites are well laid out, great size and mowed regularly. We did find however that the amenities and camp kitchen were quite dirty and it didn’t seem like they had been cleaned the entire time we were there - hence the 3 star rating. Would happily stay again if this was improved.

Lovely little park.
Staff are fantastic!!!! Manger is new and doing up the park. Can’t wait to visit again in a year or two.
Best wifi

This is one of the best holiday parks we’ve been to. Love the location and clean facilities but most importantly we love the staff and management at this park. So friendly, helpful and genuine. Thank you for always providing us with amazing service and a great experience.

While the park is out of town a fair way, it’s a pleasant ride into town.
The caravan park it’s self if not bad. For a caravan on an unpowered site we had a large tree covering our site so it kept us from getting sun.
The ammenities were not the greatest near the unpowered sites. Having a combined shower and toilet was rather annoying while people were using the showers and you just needed the toilet. It made the area very wet after people had their showers. Overall an ok caravan park, but not going back in a hurry.
Loved everything about our stay in a family villa, all staff were great and friendly (office, groundkeepers & cleaners).  Distance to town and beaches was great and would highly recommend this park.

Für die Hochsaison günstiger Campingplatz (60 € unpowred), leider 4 km vom Zentrum Byron Bay. Es fahren aber tagsüber Busse und Uber jederzeit, ca. 10 €. Platz sehr einfach, Sanitär großzügig und meistens sauber.

Really loving staying here in superior 2 bed villa with our kids. Weather has been awful and we are just enjoying kicking back and playing games and cooking in the well equipped cabin. Staff have been lovely. Will definitely stay again!

Reception staff were amazing.

Policed by worked for the entire trip. Became quite annoying. Felt targeted by staff regarding cMp guidelines.

Bathrooms not cleaned regularly over the holiday period. Very dirty and unpleasant to use.
Beautiful place, beautiful hosts.
Had a really bad experience
Location was fine. I like it’s dog friendly. Amenities were always not cleaned and not comfortable with Unisex toilet showers. Dump point was smelly and blocked.
The biggest rip off for the facilities provided. Pool dirty, dump point blocked, toilets have not been renovated since 1980. The most expensive park we have ever stayed at. WE WILL NEVER COME BACK

Excellent staff and location.  As an example, power went out in the cabin. The team were on it and fixed within 10 minutes. Sms updates about what's happening in the park is great. Friendly clean happy place. Cafe on site with awesome pizza. Great experience overall
This holiday park was great with several close amenities, wonderful spacious cabins and friendly service. More parking would be ideal for future consideration.
Unpleasant treatment from the people at reception

All.of the staff were friendly and go out of their way to help, had a lovely relaxing stay over the christmas break and will definately be back. Cannot rate you guys high enough, really good bunch of people from.mamgement all the way through.
Great place with nice camping ground. Good facilities including BBQ, fridge and microwave. Amenities are clean and neat. There is laundry on the site for extra cost.

We stayed in an ensuite site and can highly recommend them. Just great having your own private bathroom. Staying at Xmas time the park was super busy but the staff were so friendly and accomodating. Live music by the pool Xmas eve. The beach is a bit of a walk away but this didn’t bother us. The park has full amenities to keep the children busy with the pool, skatepark, basketball court and playground. Unexpectedly Kids club was also ran and my kids had a blast.
small cabin, not ideal for more than two guests.

After driving 16 hours to get there towing a caravan. I arrived 2 hours before check-in . I was told to leave and come back at 12.00. I asked where can I park up. I was then told to go to the other side of town. I looked over the fence after I parked on the grass, next to golf course, opposite the park. There was plenty of uncovered sites unoccupied where I could of parked for 2 hours.
I have a large dog and have built a portable fence and gate that contains the dog. I have used this for 4 years and the dog has never got out. I was told buy the garbage collector  that the dog can get out and I still have to tie the dog up.

I entered the park on one occasion. A lady come running up to me and was rudly ranting, saying I was speeding. I opolagised. She promptly  run up to the garbage collector who threatened to throw me out.
It was put on there daily mms they send that if a dog was found unrestrained that they can kick you out with no refund.

The wifi is useless.
There are no instructions how to use laundromat. I asked and was told the credit card machine does not work and have to use QR code. Instructions on the wall would have been a great idea.

It would be a good park but the employees need training in custom relations. They are rude and arrogant.

I had a disappointing experience with the venue's staff. Despite being a group of only four people and maintaining a quiet atmosphere, we felt unwelcomed and encountered what seemed like unfriendly behavior. Attempts to expand our booking were met with resistance, and the overall impression was one of exclusion, leaving us frustrated and sensing an unjust treatment that bordered on racism.

Furthermore, it's disheartening that we, as individuals, are seemingly penalized for the misbehavior of other backpackers. This disparity adds an extra layer of frustration to an already unpleasant experience.

Given these circumstances, we've decided that we will not be returning to the venue

Definitely not an enjoyable stay.
Staff was absolutely unfriendly almost aggressive against us! We were treated without any respect whatsoever. Seems like they don’t like backpackers or they’re just racist or whatever. When making the booking they told us we had to go through a trial week and could extend the booking afterwards. After that week they told us we could not extend the booking for some stupid reason, other people (Australians) could extend their booking though and stay for longer than just one week. They insulted us for gathering in big groups and making noise even though that wasn’t the case, seems like they just needed a reason to get rid of us. We always tried to treat everyone with respect and keep the campsite clean and tidy and didn’t break any of the camping rules, but anyways we had to leave and they basically just kicked us out in a manner that’s just not ok.
People should not feel like they’re not worth as much as other people just because of their heritage but sadly that was the case.
Talking to a lot of backpackers that were staying there as well, they confirmed us the same thing. In the end we’re all paying the same price for the camping and we’re all just humans.

Piazzole dissestate e poco curate.
I bagni in comune sporchissimi
Great spot good facilities

We camped as a group over two sites on the 28/8/23, after briefly camping at Belongil Fields (10/10 do not recommend that one)

Kath, Michael and Justine were so incredibly warm and welcoming, despite us being there a little earlier than office hours.
They were hilarious and even had their pups greet us for pats!!

We had an amazing stay and it was such a short walk to the beach. It was bliss.

Amenities were kept clean and were amazing. There’s so many options for whatever your stay requires.

When I’m back in Byron, that’s my spot!

Thanks guys! Keep up the amazing work.
superbe camping, à proximité d'une plage sublime surplombée par le phare de bayron bay

Very Nice cabane,  but à little bit too small for us . We had big suite cases and no space for them
But we love our ttime here.
The first time was really good (feb 2023) but the second time we came here was less… still friendly staff but the camp kitchens, showers and toilets were dirty all day…

Just a 5 star place! Super close to the beach, lovely grounds to camp on with constant breeze and very quiet. Staff and other campers were all a pleasure. Thanks team at Ingenia see you next time 🚐❤️✌🏼🌴

Loved our stay just for adults bunk beds are terrible kept hitting my head and my back was so sore..  bathroom was alittle tired and we couldn’t access the netflex thru the tv🤣 beach too far away felt nervous walking there by oneself.. but  saying all that we would definitely recommend 👍 it is a beautiful camp ground❤️

I hardly ever leave reviews but I'm more than happy to today. This is a really well-run holiday park with great facilities.
The Eco Pavilion Pod I stayed in was fantastic and appointed with great design features you'd hope someone would think of.
Helpful info was automated via text (check-in info, Wifi codes etc) including services at the park I wouldn't have been aware of.
The coffee at the cafe was surprisingly great too!

I given a five star rating that based on the amazing team at reception, extremely helpful and understanding. Pizza night was great!!
The location is great and just far enough out of Byron to avoid the crowds - short drive to Suffolk park bakery, Spar and the Park tavern for all your grocery needs.

Fantastic Park, great amenities, great access to the beach. Our stay was in the Tallow Pod which was immaculate and well-appointed.  The bed was super comfortable and a dream. The furnishings were excellent the outlook was great and the huge attached deck was awesome. The bathroom and shower were huge. We felt comfortable and relaxed from the moment we entered the pod.
The staff were very friendly and helpful especially Cath who made it an incredibly special stay. We will be coming back.
Incredible service, dog friendly, clean sites and very accommodating. Will be back for sure.
設施普通老舊

We booked a site with a cabin and brought along our dog. It was such a lovely experience despite the fact that it rained heavily and we had to leave early. The staff are so incredibly helpful and friendly  the grounds are very well maintained and the facilities are clean and tidy.

We would highly recommend this place and absolutely will visit again.

My husband and I stayed in the tents area, we loved everything, it is a place that they take great care of, we liked that we were able to make our breakfasts on site, because they have a well-equipped kitchen for basic things. It is a clean and pleasant place, and the people who work here are very friendly. totally recommended.

I am sharing the perspective for camping spots only. Sufficient space for unpowered camping sites is provided. And it's fairly close to the beach over a nice walk through the green. What we didn't liked are the shared bathrooms. They are always soiled and looks dull. We have stayed in many  Ingenia holiday parks, this was our least favorite unfortunately

You will not regret staying here. The manager and all her staff are absolutely lovely! Went above and beyond to ensure we could fit our large bus. Super dog friendly with an agility park on the premises and a dog beach only a 10 minute walk away. We were only planning on staying for a night, but we've been here for 4. I will 100% be returning to this park on our way back around Aus.

I use to come here many years ago when I would frequently visit Byron Bay and after 10 years I had the pleasure of staying here again! It was absolutely delightful the cabin was better than the fotos super clean and comfortable. Everyone was friendly 12/10
Will come back here 100%

Amazing! We stayed in the Eco Pods which were great value for money, clean, tidy and the beds were very comfortable. The location is great - just a short walk to the beach or a 5 minute drive into town. We will definitely be back!
Great Dog Friendly Camp site. amenities were super clean, shower had amazing pressure and was super hot!
Friendly staff. Very quiet. Clean rooms.

The staff were exceptionally friendly. We made an accidental booking error, and they were incredibly accommodating, managing to fit us in. The park offers excellent amenities and is well maintained. It's just a short 5-minute walk to the beach thanks to the park's beach access. Our stay in the 2-bedroom villa was fantastic. The beds were comfortable, and the villa itself was modern and well-equipped with everything we needed. Plus, the cafe onsite serves exceptional coffee
Had an absolute blast here in the Belle Tent, very romantic setting, very private and top notch appliances readily available to us.
Hello, can you tell me the brand of mattress heaters in the tents?
Great park... short walk to the beach and the cabins are first class

Loved the chilled out feeling of this campground, from the Manager to the staff.  Our cabin was brilliantly appointed, lovingly renovated, beds comfortable, great private space for our family of 4. Will be back soon

Der Preis des Campingplatzes war im Vergleich zu den anderen Plätzen sehr gut, deshalb haben wir gleich eine Woche gebucht. Da wir sowieso den ganzen Tag surfen waren hat uns der Campingplatz völlig ausgereicht. Was aber wirklich nicht top war, war die Sauberkeit der Toiletten und der Küche. Überall waren Haare und Dreck am Boden, einmal war die Toilettenbrille mit Stuhlgang verschmiert und das über Tage!
Wir sind wirklich nicht heikel, aber das war echt ziemlich an unserer Schmerzgrenze was Sauberkeit anbelangt.
Very happy with my stay here. Couldn't fault it from price, amenities, size of sites to service. I will return

Stayed on a poorly maintained caravan site. Needed over 100mm of levelling to get the van level. Lots of sand so no support for van levelling equipment. Drain was full of leaves which I cleared to allow our waste pipe to run.
Toilet blocks are pretty shabby, we have stayed in plenty of parks (Ingenia Soldiers Point as an example) where the amenities were considerably better. Basin wastes dirty/mouldy and no plugs provided. Didnt use laundry as payment system was down.

We stayed lot 304 powered site.
The park, generally was good overall with many facilities available to accsess. However
2 of 4 Ladies toilets were blocked during the 4 days of stay. Shower facilities were duscusting both males and females needed a decent clean. Mould, hair and grime was on the floors, edges and corners of the showers. Looked it did not have a deep clean for a while.

Permanent residents at 305 who was staff working at the camp site, asked us to be quiet before 10pm whereas we were not even making a noise, just taking to our friends.
Said they were working next day but slept in untill 9am next day.

Upon arrival resident at 305 their dog kept running amongst us while trying to set up camp not on a leashe.

Not a fun experiance.

Campsite used to be tidy and clean, but not any more. Toilets are pretty rough. I have been staying for more than a month watching every day the same rubish, mold and hairs in each shower.
They clean “private toilets” by professionales cleaners but the “tents and unpowered sites” toilets are not clean at all.
Also they put sings saying “please help us keep the toilets clean” but they should write “please clean the bathrooms as we wont do it”.
Same for kitchen and common areas.
Personal to lazy.
Bring back the old ingenia

Awesome value for money in Byron! Stayed in 2bedroom villa which was spacious and well appointed… great family holiday spot!! Pathway (700 meters or so ) to beach and a bike ride or short drive to Main Street! Highly recommend!!
The staff couldn't be more helpful, very nice spot I'll definitely stay here again.
Great place to stay and just a short scenic walk to the beach
Siamo stati benissimo. Ideale per famiglie.
Best Location, Great Price, Clean and Serene. Awesome for families, furbabies and group bookings. Highly recommended!

Perfectly positioned just on the outskirts of Byron, pet and family friendly relaxed environment with great amenities and beautiful wood fired pizza and vending machines were a lifesaver for midnight munchies, Definitely returning.

Wish we were staying longer to utilise all the facilities.
Cute, comfy little cabins.

Très beau camping et a proximité de la plage et les animaux sont acceptés.
PS: essayer de nettoyer les sanitaires plus souvent.
Had a great stay
Ingenia staff make you feel really welcome. We felt safe, slept really well and felt really relaxed.
We took our own van and booked an ensuite, powered site. Everything was kept very clean and the staff very friendly and helpful. A nice walk to the beach and even our 2 dogs enjoyed themselves.
Great place to stay and great value.
Clean, tidy overall a great place to stay.

Good location, close to the Beach and town.
Good value for money

My partner and I stayed in the Tallow Pod in Byron Bay, it was one of the nicest accommodations we've ever stayed in.  Full on luxury.   The beach was walking distance and we had everything we needed to enjoy and relax.  The staff were beyond helpful and accommodating.  We were very thankful and enjoyed every bit of our stay.  Would recommend to anybody coming to Byron.   Thanks again!

Reception staff were also not very helpful. There was a potential gail forecast so I asked if I could park my car on the next pitch to act as a wind break and even though there was nobody on the next pitch and no one was booked onto it the lady on reception said no.

Unpowered pitch’s are very small and approx 4 or 5 meters wide.

Toilet blocks are very grimy and had lots of mould around the floor of the showers and were not kept very clean. Paint was rubbed and faded away  all over the toilet block.
Great spot, rooms are freshly renovated and look amazing. Staff were fantastic. Plenty to do for kids. Very well looked after place

Excellent stay! Cannot speak highly enough. Excellent service, late check-in procedure was very helpful, room was super comfortable, especially loved the SBS chill on the tele when I arrived :) would stay again for sure!

Busy caravan park during school holidays.  Other guests were reasonably respectful, though there was 1 group that was a little over the top and a few dogs that barked for hours.  Only thing I could suggest is that there is signage to/from the beach/park as it's easy to become confused when using the track for the first time.

Best stay, considering it was a public holiday and all the other places were ridiculously expensive. This place gave the best value for money. Cabin Studios was super cute with everything provided. It even included the hairdryer! The staff was ok, too. They were pretty busy that day, but we got everything we needed. The park is fantastic, just a 10 min walk to the beach. Would highly recommend it.

I booked this place for Oct long weekend and it had a great vibe! We booked a queen studio cabin - it was smaller than what was shown in the pictures, especially the bathroom 😐 Room was clean and had basic amenities. We were given free wifi but informed that there were 800 other people on the property and using wifi would be difficult so needed to use my own data - which was ok but one would expect a better wifi connection if you expecting 800pax on your property 💁🏼‍♀️
The restro/bar on the property was good with Pizzas but the cocktail was really bad - we tried Aperol Spritz which didn’t taste like it at all - too bitter and it was off! Happy hour (4-6pm) but they had just Pale ale beers and I didn’t dare to try other cocktail!
Food - Pizza made from the scratch were pretty impressive and tasted fresh & good!
Just 7-8mins walk to the Tallow beach and 10mins drive to Broken Head beach!
It was 10mins drive to the City centre so location wise it was perfect!
Lit up during evenings and plenty of people glamping, camping and some were in rooms! Well maintained property.

If camping, the main road was very noisey throughout the night/morning, camp amenities were not clean with mould/scum/dirt build up & was very slippery when guests did not use provided squeegees.
Staff were great & Facilities for kids was great. Noise and cleanliness unfortunately just let our families down.

Family and baby friendly, Beautiful park, amazing service and close to Suffolk, Byron bay and tea tree lake
We proudly deliver all your baby and holiday items to this stay

Another perfect stay with my little lady- highly recommend this camp spot over the rest in bryon the location is perfect, a nice walk to the beach which seems like your own paradise. Thank you Amy (reception ) and Cath (management) the level of care for your visitors is above and beyond! Can’t wait to come back - thank you just amazing wish we could of stayed longer but will see you all again soon fingers crossed 🦋
Family friendly and clean cabin - feel very welcome - the place to stay thank you 🙏
Loved it, very relaxing and a lovely community.

Outdated shabby facilities, no concrete slabs for caravans, very bumpy and muddy area for the annex, and the place generally looks run down. Beach too far and too rough for small kids. Asked to put me away from trees and had literally a bird nest above my head with a bird pooping on my awning and mat through the whole stay. The site was at the end of a dead end road and staff suggested I back my caravan 100m to it - first time in my life, honestly. Not coming back here.
Lovely setting and friendly, welcoming staff. The cabin was unfortunately dirty with mould on the walls. Beautiful beach and plenty to keep children entertained, such a shame about the cabin.
Travelled recently with my daughter and got a taste of glamping. Absolutely loved it, and am already recommending it to friends. Our first trip to Byron, won't be the last !
Fantastic family camping snuggled onnone of the world’s best beaches
We loved the place and the cabin.

Very highly recommend Ingenia Holidays Byron Bay. The park it self was very clean. Our cabin was spotless and very well appointed. Staff super friendly and helpful. The location is perfect, especially given its easy access to the beach at the rear of the park. Pool area lovely and super cafe' onsite a real bonus. Will be returning!!

My family and I enjoyed our time here. The location is good, easy walk to the beach and a short drive into Byron CBD.  The park felt safe and our site was nice and big. The downfall for the park is that the park facilities felt old and upkeep has not been strong. The playground is outdated, no swings and needs more shade.
amazing location. access to beach. out of town so not as hectic. Friendly staff. love having a wood fired pizza on Friday night

It‘s a nice place with clean showers and toiletts. Laundry can be paid by card.   This spot is about 10min out of Byron Bay by car and a 10min walk from the beach. It‘s close to the street which causes a bit of noise.
With an online discount we paid 41$ a night for unpowerd site.
The best holiday experience we've ever had.  Staff, location and professionalism set the new level customer satisfaction.  Thank you Cath and Michelle.

Kid friendly Park but not Grey Nomad friendly. Van site too small to fit car on as well, was not allowed to park on neighbouring site. We also asked to be moved to larger site, but even though park was practically empty for September, they were not able to accommodate us. Made us park 50 metres away!!!
Cath was nothing but accommodating during our 3 night stay, perfect location just by the beach and plenty to experience and enjoy within the area
Great location. Clean. Comfortable bed. Good facilities. Beach within walking distance.

The amenities are clean and modern. The unpowered sites are are on the smaller side and lack any shade. We had no room to spare after setting up our awning. Nice short walk down to the beach and a quick Uber into Byron. We did get eaten alive by mozzies though.
Great place to stay but all of Byron Bay area is so expensive to stay these days. Will choose a more affordable area to holiday in next time.

OUR STUDIO APPARTMENT WAS OLD, TIRED AND WORN.
HAD A PLASTIC SHOWER CURTAIN, BATHROOM NEEDED A NEW TOILET AND BASIN. NO HANGING SPACE FOR CLOTHES AND KITCHEN WAS WORN OUT.
PARKING SPACE FOR CAR WAS TAKEN UP BY A PINE TREE.
ALL THIS FOR $180 PER NIGHT. WHAT A RIP OFF.

I can easy give service a 6 starts+ from the moment we spoke over the phone to the days we spent there, everything was perfect!!! Everyone from the team treated us with lot of respect and big smiles!!! Our dog loved it, the kitchens and bathrooms were always spotless. It will become our official family camping from now on!!! Thanks all!!
The location is good and the camp sites are pet friendly. The toilets and showers are old and often dirty.

Stayed in the Belle tent through Airbnb
Was a perfect getaway for me and my partner, wil definitely be back and recommending.
Awesome concept

Great place to stay for a night or a week great service at the reception friendly and helpful always ready to help and keep you updated with what is going on and the little restaurants at the front has excellent service and great food there is also a beautiful little place to get spoilt with a pampered
We have been there before with our little fur baby 🐶 but not this time
The cabin is great 😊 nice comfy bed I slept in
And the hole place is so lovely and quiet
I recommend this place for anyone that needs a little time away from home 🏡
Thank you so much
Michelle and staff for your support on arrival
Stayed here recently, great family park and our dog loved it also..great dog wash area.
The Belle Tents were a fun and unique way to glamp! Will be back.

We stayed here for a week on one of the caravan sites. We liked the park because it was convenient to Byron Bay and surrounds, and most importantly, was dog friendly. The park has a very nice vibe, and access to a large dog friendly beach. The staff we dealt with were all very friendly and helpful. An enjoyable stay.
Will be back

An amazing stay in the belle tent. The rooms themselves were lovely, I wish the bathrooms looked a bit nicer but everything else was great! We weren’t able to see the stars from the bed due to moisture on the tent unfortunately, but I guess that’s just luck of the draw.
Can get quite busy during school drop off and pick up on the road. But otherwise a great park. With a massage place on site as well as a pizza and pasta bar/ cafe.
Great quiet dog friendly caravan park on the beach close to Byron
Stayed in the Belle Tent. Awesome experience.

I always stay with big4-ingenia group so I understand what to expect when I book a accommodation. My family of 4 were passing threw from Sunshine Coast to Sydney and stayed 1 night here. The room was small but that's OK . The furniture was something from a second hand store from 1980. 1 power point in the kitchen was on the tabletop which prevented me from pluging my phone charger in. The fridge was from 1990. There was 3x forks and spoons but u allowed me to book for a family of 4. Kids play equipment was from 1960. You want to charge $220 a night at least provide better product to your customers. Our next stop was ingenia port Macquarie which was far better accommodation at $250 a night we enjoyed 2 nights there.

We have had the pleasure of staying here both powered site and pet friendly cabin,
Both experiences were very different surprisingly this is what we found
Powered site-
No hard flooring as it was rainy when we were there
Unisex bathrooms -
Don’t know how we felt about this one but I think it has the right modern intentions just abit more dirtier than the single sex toilets/ bathrooms,
A lot of happy campers and doggos
Park was so attentive to our decision making - we couldn’t choose what site we wanted and they were very patient with us even stayed after hours,
All in all we enjoyed our caravan stay at the park although it is very rainforest terrain so if it is wet it does make it abit trickier keeping the mud dirt outside but I think the park were looking at putting concrete sites in eventually as they are expanding every year

Cabins-
Omg not a bad detail ! You can have your doggo in there and everything is supplied to make it easier the cleaner girls oh how lovely are they! They gave us as many changes and refills when needed they were very nice and easy to chat to!
It was so different to our powered site we had allot more time to explore and actually wanted to be out for dinner and things for us beach time so close to the cabins loved every min of the walk so did our dog personally we loved this and enjoyed the cabins more but I hope they put more in because I can see this park becoming huge and everyone and there doggos wanting to stay here if you are here for to see the real side of Byron! Putting up with the terrain weather and ever changing conditions is part of the process of what makes Byron and ingenia great and somewhere we want to return to for years to come !
Until we are back in your safe grounds again ,
It has been a pleasure ingenia!
Cannot wait for our return already
Well cared for park with friendly staff.
